name: Wireless Charging Stand & Lamp (Includes LED Light Bulb) - Threshold™: Desk Lamp with USB Port, Qi Certified, Dimmable
description:
Work or study late at night in comfort with the Wireless Charging Stand & Lamp (Includes LED Light Bulb) from Threshold™. This wireless charging stand comes with multiple ports for charging your mobile phone and more while you're working. It has a dimmable light setting to help you adjust the level of lighting, and it easily turns on and off with the base turn knob rotary switch.

Threshold™: Quality & Design / Casual classics for house and home.
